bead.title: refactor(svelte): NavShell derives nav hrefs from nodeStore + projectStore, show real node name
bead.description:
Opus Stage 3 batch review (2026-04-15): src/lib/components/NavShell.svelte:19-26 hardcodes non-scoped nav paths ('/beads', '/documents', etc.) violating the locked URL scheme '/nodes/:nodeId/projects/:projectId/*'. The top-nav string 'Node: localhost' is also hardcoded; should read $lib/stores/node.svelte.

Scope: derive hrefs using $derived from nodeStore.value?.id and projectStore.value?.id. Render the real node name once nodeStore populates. Add a fallback '/(no project)' state when projectStore is empty.
bead.acceptance: (1) NavShell hrefs are of the form /nodes/{nodeId}/projects/{projectId}/{page}. (2) Node name in top nav reads from nodeStore, not hardcoded. (3) Fallback state when nodeStore or projectStore is empty does not break navigation. (4) bun run check green.
